title: VOCATIONAL REHABILITATION SERVICES - 211info
text: BAKER CITY VOCATIONAL REHABILITATION VOCATIONAL REHABILITATION SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Assists individuals with disabilities in finding and keeping jobs that match their skills, interests, and abilities. Services include vocational counseling, evaluation, physical restoration, skills training, job placement, and support for independent living. Services are provided in partnership with businesses, state agencies, community rehabilitation programs, and independent living service providers. 3165 10th Street Suite 500 Baker City, OR 97814 Eligibility: Must have a documented physical, mental, or emotional condition that makes it difficult to get or keep a job Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm, closed major holidays (541) 523-8444 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 523-8444 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for appointment FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Documentation regarding disability LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Baker County Services: Comprehensive Disability Related Employment Programs Job Development * Adults With Disabilities/Health Conditions Vocational Rehabilitation Other Services Offered At This Location: PUBLIC ASSISTANCE PROGRAMS - EMPLOYMENT RELATED DAYCARE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. BAKER CITY VOCATIONAL REHABILITATION
